_comment: BARYCENTER — Default parameter ranges. Values are starting points, not final physics. All systems read from this file; no magic numbers in code.

planet._comment_radius: Simulation units. 1 unit ≈ 1 metre equivalent at character scale.

day._comment: Real-time minutes per full planet rotation. Range: 60–120.

binary._comment: Real-time minutes for secondary sun to complete one orbit relative to primary. Range: 10–30.
binary._comment_color: Primary is warm (K/G-type ~5000K implied), secondary is hotter/bluer.
binary._comment_mass_ratio: M2/M1 mass ratio. Determines barycenter split.

sun1._comment_ang: Apparent angular radius of primary sun disc (degrees).

sun2._comment_ang: Apparent angular radius of secondary sun disc (degrees).

astro._comment: Global time multiplier for AstroSystem (dev: increase to speed up cycles).
astro._comment_sep: Binary separation as a multiple of planet_radius_units.

sun1._comment: Primary sun color temperature in Kelvin (warm K/G-type star).

sun2._comment: Secondary sun color temperature in Kelvin (hotter blue star).

occult._comment: Artistic softness [0=hard, 1=smooth] for sun-sun occultation transition.

ring._comment: Ring opacity [0-1]. Controls maximum shadow depth.
ring._comment_seg: Amplitude of procedural band/gap variation in ring shadow [0-1].

ring._comment_tilt: Ring plane tilt relative to equatorial plane, degrees.

moon._comment_radius_mul: Moon radius as fraction of planet radius.

atmosphere._comment_dust: Baseline dust suspension (0–1). Storms push this higher.
atmosphere._comment_haze: Atmospheric scattering density (0–1). Controls depth-layer separation.
atmosphere._comment_scatter: RGB, normalised. Warm dusty atmosphere tint.

pixel._comment: Integer only. Frame rendered at 1/N resolution then upscaled. Range: 3–6.
pixel._comment_dither: 0 = no dither, 1 = full Bayer matrix amplitude.
pixel._comment_palette: Effective colour levels per channel after quantisation. Not a hard 8-bit lock.

lighting._comment: Discrete surface shading bands. 0 = smooth, 1–5 = stepped. Range: 0–5.
lighting._comment_elev: Primary sun elevation cap for default composition state.

climate._comment: Base wind speed in simulation units/s at sea level.
climate._comment_storm: Pressure differential (normalised 0–1) above which storm onset begins.
climate._comment_thermal: Climate field inertia. Higher = slower response to Insolation changes.
climate._comment_grid_w: Climate grid width (longitude axis). Lower than insolation for performance.
climate._comment_grid_h: Climate grid height (latitude axis). Recommended 2:1 aspect ratio.
climate._comment_dt: Target game-seconds per climate update tick.
climate._comment_temp_base: Baseline equatorial surface temperature in Kelvin.
climate._comment_temp_lat_k: Kelvin drop from equator to pole (T_base = T_equator - k * |lat_fraction|).
climate._comment_heat_gain: Heating rate coefficient (K/s per unit insolation).
climate._comment_heat_loss: Cooling rate coefficient (1/s); controls thermal inertia.
climate._comment_p_from_t: Pressure deviation per Kelvin departure from mean temperature.
climate._comment_wind_base_strength: Base zonal wind speed (m/s) used for three-cell circulation model.
climate._comment_wind_gradP: Scaling factor for pressure-gradient wind contribution.
climate._comment_wind_max: Maximum allowed wind speed (m/s). Values above this are clamped.
climate._comment_wind_damping: Fractional wind speed decay per second (surface friction).
climate._comment_dust_dep: Fraction of suspended dust deposited per second in calm conditions.
climate._comment_dust_lift: Dust lifting rate (per m/s above threshold, per second).
climate._comment_dust_thresh: Minimum wind speed (m/s) required to lift dust.
climate._comment_storm_dust: Minimum dust concentration for storm birth candidate.
climate._comment_storm_wind: Minimum wind speed (m/s) for storm birth candidate.
climate._comment_vis_k: Visibility decay constant: visibility = exp(-dust * k).
climate._comment_freeze: Temperature (K) below which humidity converts to ice.
climate._comment_melt: Temperature (K) above which ice converts back to humidity.

geo._comment_scree: Expected scree events per real-time hour across the whole planet.
geo._comment_rift: Rifts are rare. One every ~20 real-time hours expected globally.

events._comment_rate_minor: Maximum minor geo-events per simulated hour globally.
events._comment_rate_major: Maximum major (destructive) geo-events per simulated hour.
events._comment_min_dist: Events closer than this to the player are suppressed (0 = no minimum).
events._comment_max_dist: Events farther than this from the player are suppressed.
events._comment_cooldown: Per-tile cooldown in game minutes after an event fires.

fault._comment_length: Default fault crack length in simulation units.
fault._comment_width: Carve radius of each capsule segment.
fault._comment_depth: How far radially into the rock the crack penetrates.

landslide._comment_volume: Carve radius at the slide source (proxy for volume).
landslide._comment_runout: Distance from source to deposit centre in simulation units.

collapse._comment_radius: Radius of the underground void chamber.
collapse._comment_depth: Depth below surface of the collapse chamber.

event._comment_pre: Duration of the PRE (precursor) phase in game seconds.
event._comment_post: Duration of the POST (aftermath) phase in game seconds.

tectonic._comment_stress_rate: Rate at which stress accumulates per second in boundary zones.
tectonic._comment_fracture_rate: Rate at which fracture accumulates from stress per second.
tectonic._comment_field: Equirectangular field resolution (width × height). Coarse is intentional.
tectonic._comment_boundary: Angular distance (radians) within which a point is considered a boundary zone.
tectonic._comment_ridge: Height multiplier for convergent ridges (fraction of HEIGHT_SCALE).
tectonic._comment_rift_amp: Depth multiplier for divergent rift valleys.
tectonic._comment_dev: Dev mode: enable plate/boundary/stress colour overlay (dev only).

character._comment_friction: Surface friction below this value triggers slide state.
character._comment_wind: Wind speed above which crouch_reflex state activates.
character._comment_quake: Quake impulse magnitude (normalised) above which brace state activates.

char._comment_mass: Character mass (kg equivalent). Affects wind/impulse response.
char._comment_gravity: Surface gravity (m/s^2 equivalent). Should match planet.gravity.
char._comment_wind_drag: Wind force multiplier on character (higher = more push).
char._comment_max_slope: Maximum walkable slope in degrees; above this triggers Sliding.
char._comment_slide_friction: Friction coefficient while in Sliding state.
char._comment_ice_friction: Multiplier on base friction when surface is fully icy (0=glass).
char._comment_dust_slip: Fraction by which deep dust reduces friction.
char._comment_stumble_shock: Minimum GeoEventSignal intensity to trigger Stumbling.

seed._comment: Default world seed. Any integer is valid. Determines all procedural generation.

time._comment_scale: Game-seconds per real-second (WorldClock.time_scale). 1 = real-time. Dev only.
time._comment_clamp: Maximum real-time dt per frame (seconds). Prevents spiral-of-death on stalled frames.

sched._comment_insol_hz: Update rate for InsolationField in Hz (calls per game-second). Range: 2–5.
sched._comment_climate_dt: Fixed time-step for ClimateSystem (game-seconds per step). Range: 0.5–2.0.
sched._comment_geo_tick: Fixed interval between TectonicPlatesSystem stress updates (game-seconds). Range: 2–10.
sched._comment_geoevent_tick: Fixed interval between GeoEventSystem risk ticks (game-seconds). Range: 5–20.
sched._comment_near_radius: Radius (simulation units) around the player treated as near-field for temporal LOD.
sched._comment_far_div: Far-field regions are refreshed every N climate ticks (1 = same as near-field).
sched._comment_job_ms: Wall-time budget per frame for the BudgetedJobQueue (milliseconds).
sched._comment_job_max: Maximum number of queued jobs processed per frame.
sched._comment_keyframe: Server sends ASTRO_KEYFRAME to clients every N game-seconds.

lod._comment_min: Minimum quadtree depth (0 = whole face as one tile).
lod._comment_max: Maximum quadtree depth. Each level halves the tile angular size.
lod._comment_res: NxN vertices per tile. Must be 2^k+1 (e.g. 9, 17, 33).
lod._comment_active: Hard cap on simultaneously active leaf tiles across all faces.
lod._comment_jobs: Max tile meshes built per game frame (controls stutter budget).
lod._comment_debug: When true, logs active tile count and job-queue depth each frame.

insolation._comment_width: Equirectangular grid width (longitude axis). 64 is adequate for climate; use 512 for high-fidelity renders.
insolation._comment_height: Equirectangular grid height (latitude axis). Recommended aspect ratio 2:1.
insolation._comment_cpt: Cells updated per update() call. null = auto (field_width*field_height / 10). Tune to stay within frame budget.
insolation._comment_interval: Target interval (game seconds) between full-field passes. Informational only; actual rate depends on cells_per_tick and call frequency.

atmo._comment_haze_density: Base exponential haze density (Beer-Lambert). Higher = thicker haze at all distances.
atmo._comment_haze_height: Height decay rate for haze density (per simulation unit altitude).
atmo._comment_mie_g: Henyey-Greenstein anisotropy factor. 0=isotropic, closer to 1=stronger forward lobe.
atmo._comment_vol_steps: Volumetric dust ray-march step count. Range: 8–24.
atmo._comment_vol_max_dist: Maximum ray-march distance for volumetric dust (simulation units).
atmo._comment_vol_density: Global multiplier on sampled dust density in the volumetric pass.
atmo._comment_whiteout: Dust level [0-1] above which transmittance collapses toward white (storm whiteout).
atmo._comment_sun2_limit: Maximum fraction of Sun1's sky contribution that Sun2 can add (prevents washed-out sky).

grade._comment_filmic_toe: Filmic curve toe breakpoint. Values below this pass through linearly.
grade._comment_filmic_shoulder: Filmic curve shoulder breakpoint. Values above this are compressed toward white.
grade._comment_shadow_tint: RGB tint applied to dark (shadow) tones for cool-shadow split-toning.
grade._comment_highlight_tint: RGB tint applied to bright (highlight) tones for warm-highlight split-toning.
grade._comment_sat_far: Maximum desaturation applied to far pixels (fog_factor=1). 0=no desat, 1=full greyscale.

sdf._comment_lod: LOD level of surface tiles used as SDF chunk anchors. Higher = finer tiles = more chunks near player.
sdf._comment_resolution: Voxels per side per SDF chunk (e.g. 16 = 16x16x16). Must be even.
sdf._comment_voxel_depth: Radial metres per voxel. Controls vertical detail and chunk depth.
sdf._comment_depth_min: Minimum depth_index to stream (0 = surface-straddling layer).
sdf._comment_depth_max: Maximum depth_index to stream. Increase to stream deeper underground layers.
sdf._comment_cache: Maximum number of SDF chunks kept in memory simultaneously.
sdf._comment_dev_carve: Dev mode: carve a test cavity near spawn on startup (for development only).
sdf._comment_dev_carve_r: Radius of the dev-mode test carve sphere (simulation units).

env._comment_wind_lean_max: Wind speed (m/s) at which upper-body lean reaches maximum.
env._comment_headwind_speed_k: Fraction of speed lost per m/s of headwind.
env._comment_whiteout_turn_k: Multiplier applied to turn_responsiveness at full whiteout.
env._comment_whiteout_stride_scale: Minimum stride scale at full whiteout visibility.
env._comment_ice_friction_min: Effective-friction scale at maximum ice coverage.
env._comment_dust_viscosity_k: Fraction by which deep dust reduces speed.
env._comment_slope_speed_k: Speed scale reduction per radian of slope angle.
env._comment_stability_balance_k: Balance-loss scale increase when ground_stability is 0.
env._comment_variation_window: RNG bucket size (seconds) — micro-variations change at most once per window.
env._comment_variation_strength: Max fractional micro-variation added to stride/cadence.

reflex._comment_recovery: Balance recovery speed per second while grounded, slow, and braced/crouched.
reflex._comment_wind_k: Multiplier converting wind speed to per-second balance loss.
reflex._comment_shock_k: Multiplier converting geo-event shock intensity to balance loss.
reflex._comment_slope_k: Multiplier converting slope angle (radians) to per-second balance loss.
reflex._comment_fall: Balance level at or below which ControlledFall is triggered.
reflex._comment_gust: Tangential wind speed (m/s) above which CrouchInGust reflex activates.
reflex._comment_brace_slope: Slope angle (radians, ~26 deg) above which Brace reflex activates.
reflex._comment_brace_reach: Maximum arm reach for brace-contact probe (simulation units).
reflex._comment_brace_dur: Minimum time (seconds) Brace stance is held after activation.
reflex._comment_grab_speed: Maximum speed (m/s) at which GrabLedge reflex can trigger.
reflex._comment_grab_hold: Time (seconds) character can hang from a ledge before releasing.
reflex._comment_stumble_boost: Velocity boost (m/s) applied per second during StumbleStep reflex.
reflex._comment_slip_recover: Per-second fractional velocity reduction during SlipRecover reflex.
reflex._comment_slip_max: Maximum slope angle (radians, ~37 deg) for SlipRecover; steeper = unrecoverable.
reflex._comment_ledge_step: Distance ahead (simulation units) used for ledge probe.
reflex._comment_ledge_thresh: Minimum height drop (simulation units) to classify as a ledge.
reflex._comment_dev_vis: Dev mode: log reflex state and probe rays each tick (no UI).
reflex._comment_hysteresis: Minimum Δ to update reflex r upward (avoids jitter).

cam._comment_cooldown: Minimum seconds a camera mode must be held before switching again.

explore._comment_dist: Camera boom distance (simulation units) in Exploration mode.
explore._comment_height: Camera height offset above character in Exploration mode.

struggle._comment_dist: Camera boom distance in Struggle mode (closer to character).
struggle._comment_height: Camera height offset in Struggle mode (lower).

awe._comment_dist: Camera boom distance in Awe mode (further back).
awe._comment_height: Camera height offset in Awe mode (higher for sky composition).
awe._comment_fov: Vertical field-of-view in Awe mode (slightly wider).
awe._comment_awe_cooldown: Seconds after leaving Awe before it can trigger again.
awe._comment_min_hold: Minimum seconds Awe mode is held once triggered.

spring._comment_freq_pos: Spring natural frequency for position (rad/s). Higher = snappier follow.
spring._comment_damp_pos: Damping ratio for position spring (1.0 = critically damped).

cam._comment_collision_radius: Sphere-cast radius for camera collision detection (simulation units).
cam._comment_wind_shake_k: Scale factor: shake amplitude per (m/s) of wind speed.
cam._comment_geo_shake_pre: Shake amplitude per unit of pre-event intensity.
cam._comment_geo_shake_impact: Shake amplitude (kick) per unit of impact intensity.
cam._comment_pan_max: Maximum degrees the camera pans toward a geo-event epicentre.
cam._comment_shoulder: Lateral shoulder offset for slight over-the-shoulder framing.
cam._comment_struggle_enter_vis: Visibility threshold below which Struggle mode is entered.
cam._comment_struggle_exit_vis: Visibility threshold above which Struggle mode can be exited.
cam._comment_struggle_enter_storm: Storm intensity threshold above which Struggle mode is entered.
cam._comment_struggle_exit_storm: Storm intensity threshold below which Struggle mode can be exited.
cam._comment_awe_enter_eclipse: Eclipse factor above which Awe mode can be triggered.
cam._comment_awe_enter_vis: Minimum visibility required for Awe mode to trigger.

anim._comment_stride: Base stride length in simulation units. Scaled by AnimParamFrame.stride_length.
anim._comment_cadence: Base gait cadence (cycles per game-second). Scaled by AnimParamFrame.cadence.
anim._comment_step_h: Base foot-lift height (simulation units) during swing phase.
anim._comment_stance_w: Lateral distance from centre-line to each foot (simulation units).
anim._comment_foot_align: Blend weight [0..1] for aligning foot to ground normal (0=ignore normal, 1=full align).
anim._comment_ik: Maximum iterations for 2-bone IK solver. 1-2 is sufficient for FK-seeded solutions.
anim._comment_exag: Maximum fractional exaggeration of arm/torso motion at full effort.
anim._comment_squash: Maximum pelvis scale deviation for squash/stretch (e.g. 0.07 = ±7%).
anim._comment_timing_var: Maximum fractional cadence variation added by seeded per-bucket noise.
anim._comment_jitter: Peak angular micro-jitter (radians) applied to head at max micro_jitter intensity.
anim._comment_hand_bias: Probability [0..1] of choosing the left hand for brace. 0.5 = equal chance.
anim._comment_blend: Easing function used for action-layer blend weights. Currently: ease_in_out.

audio._comment: Stage 19 ProceduralAudioSystem — all synthesis, no external assets.
audio._comment_suit_gain: Suit (breath/fabric/servo) channel output gain. Low by design — suit is subtle.
audio._comment_whistle_enable: Enable narrow-band wind whistle layer in strong winds.
audio._comment_whistle_strength: Amplitude multiplier for wind whistle layer [0..1].
audio._comment_storm_duck: How strongly the Storm channel ducks Footsteps and Suit [0=no duck, 1=full silence].
audio._comment_foot_dust_tail: Noise tail length (ms) for a dust-surface footstep.
audio._comment_foot_rock_click: Amplitude multiplier for the short high-frequency click on rock surfaces.
audio._comment_foot_ice_squeal: Amplitude of the ice-squeal band-pass layer on ice footsteps.
audio._comment_geo_pre_rumble: Gain for the PRE-phase infrasound rumble.
audio._comment_geo_pre_release: Release time (seconds) for the PRE-phase rumble envelope.
audio._comment_geo_impact: Gain for the IMPACT-phase thump and debris bursts.
audio._comment_limiter_threshold: Master limiter kick-in level [0..1]. Values above this are compressed.
audio._comment_limiter_release: Master limiter release time in seconds.
audio._comment_stage36: Stage 36 — Generative Foley from Physics (modal synthesis, no wav/ogg assets).
audio._comment_enable_procedural: Master switch: use physics-driven procedural foley (true) or legacy bursts (false).
audio._comment_max_resonators: Hard cap on simultaneous ModalResonatorVoice instances.
audio._comment_modal_modes: Maximum number of resonant modes per voice (3–20 range, trades CPU for realism).
audio._comment_granular_k: Scale factor for crumble / granular micro-burst amplitude.
audio._comment_friction_k: Scale factor for friction/sliding noise excitation amplitude.
audio._comment_atmo_dust: Dust-density low-pass strength multiplier (higher = more HF cut in dust storms).
audio._comment_cave_reverb: Wet/dry mix for the cave delay-network reverb [0..1].
audio._comment_network_impulse: Internal contact-impulse aggregation rate [Hz]. Sent compressed over net.

save._comment_geo_impact: When true, an extra save is triggered after each major geo event.
save._comment_schema: Save-file schema version; increment when save format changes.

boot._comment_spawn_attempts: Number of candidate spawn points evaluated; more → better spawn, slower boot.
boot._comment_spawn_slope: Spawn candidates with slope above this (degrees) are penalised.
boot._comment_spawn_stability: Spawn candidates with geological stability below this are penalised.
boot._comment_spawn_storm: Visibility threshold below which a spawning location is penalised.
boot._comment_warmup: Simulated seconds of climate warm-up on first boot (no saved snapshot).

dev._comment_headless: When true, disables all rendering and audio (for CI / smoke tests).

net._comment_enabled: Set true to start the WebSocket server on launch.
net._comment_player_send_hz: Maximum PLAYER_STATE messages accepted from a single client per second (rate limit).
net._comment_player_broadcast_hz: Alias / override for tick_hz_players used by Stage 22 interest-management loop.
net._comment_spawn_r: Scatter radius (m) around the shared spawn anchor.
net._comment_interest: Angular sector (degrees) for one interest sector tile.
net._comment_sector_deg: Alias for interest_sector_deg used by Stage 22 interest management.
net._comment_sector_radius: Number of neighbouring sector rings included in each client's subscription.
net._comment_interp_delay_ms: Client-side interpolation delay in milliseconds for remote players.
net._comment_max_extrap_ms: Maximum extrapolation window (ms) before remote player is frozen.
net._comment_resync_hard: simTime error (seconds) above which a hard time-resync is applied on the client.
net._comment_appearance_send: Broadcast SuitKitDescriptor to all clients when a player joins.

perf._comment_mesh_budget_ms: Wall-time budget per frame for chunk meshing (milliseconds).
perf._comment_max_chunks_remote: Maximum chunk re-meshes triggered by remote PATCH_BATCH per frame.
perf._comment_auto_quality: When true the client automatically reduces quality (vol steps, update divisor) on low FPS.

web._comment: Stage 23 — browser deploy / WASM build settings.
web._comment_build_id: Content hash injected by build_web.sh; empty means auto-computed at runtime.
web._comment_sw: Installs a Service Worker for offline asset caching.
web._comment_webgpu: Attempt WebGPU renderer first; falls back to WebGL2.
web._comment_webgl2: Allow WebGL2 as a fallback when WebGPU is unavailable.
web._comment_reload: Force location.reload() (with throttle) when server buildId differs from client.
web._comment_ws_path: WebSocket endpoint path on the HTTP server.
web._comment_static_dir: Directory containing hashed static assets served by the server.
web._comment_ping: Server-side WebSocket ping interval in seconds (0 = disabled).
web._comment_range: Serve Accept-Ranges: bytes for binary asset files.

world._comment: When true, a missing world_state/ creates a fresh world on next start.

presence._comment: Stage 25 — diegetic multiplayer presence (no UI, no markers).
presence._comment_headlamp_day: Headlamp output multiplier during daylight. Low — barely noticeable in bright light.
presence._comment_headlamp_night: Headlamp output multiplier at night. Full beam visible at distance.
presence._comment_headlamp_scatter: Whiteout scatter halo radius multiplier. 0=no halo, 1=max diffuse dome.
presence._comment_trails_ttl: Default trail segment lifetime in seconds on dust/debris surfaces.
presence._comment_trails_ttl_storm: Multiply TTL by this factor during storm (wind erases faster). Range 0..1.
presence._comment_trails_max: Maximum active trail segments within the near-camera zone (LRU eviction).
presence._comment_trails_sector: Number of planet sectors cached for trail data.
presence._comment_net_trail_batch: Client-side trail event batch window in milliseconds.
presence._comment_audio_remote_foot: Gain for remote player footstep sounds (distance-attenuated on top of this).
presence._comment_audio_remote_cutoff: LP-filter cutoff (Hz) applied to remote footsteps during storm.
presence._comment_remote_lod_1: Distance (sim units) below which full procedural animation is used for remote players.
presence._comment_remote_lod_2: Distance (sim units) above which only the cheapest LOD rig is used.

subsurface._comment: Stage 26 — subsurface world: caves, lava tubes, chambers, collapses.
subsurface._comment_enable: Master toggle for the subsurface system.
subsurface._comment_seed_salt: XOR salt applied to the global seed before cave generation.
subsurface._comment_shallow_prob: Probability of generating a node in the shallow layer (0–200 m).
subsurface._comment_mid_prob: Probability of generating a node in the mid layer (200–1000 m).
subsurface._comment_deep_prob: Probability of generating a node in the deep layer (1–5 km).
subsurface._comment_portal_frequency: Probability that a shallow cave node has a surface entry portal.
subsurface._comment_cave_light_scatter: Headlamp volumetric scatter in caves (0=off, 1=max diffuse).
subsurface._comment_cave_audio_reverb_mix: Reverb wet mix for cave acoustics (0=dry, 1=full reverb).
subsurface._comment_collapse_event_rate_cap: Maximum server-authoritative collapse events per in-game hour.

subhaz._comment: Stage 27 — subsurface hazards: cave collapses, sags, dust waves.
subhaz._comment_risk_threshold: Sigmoid risk value above which an event may fire.
subhaz._comment_max_events_per_hour_global: Hard cap on hazard events fired globally per in-game hour.
subhaz._comment_max_events_per_hour_zone: Hard cap on hazard events fired per cave zone per in-game hour.
subhaz._comment_chain_max_depth: Maximum chain-collapse propagation depth (hops through cave graph).
subhaz._comment_chain_decay: Per-hop probability decay for chain collapses (0..1).
subhaz._comment_max_patches_per_event: Maximum SDF patches generated per hazard event (performance cap).
subhaz._comment_dust_peak_density: Peak visibility-reduction density of a dust wave [0..1].
subhaz._comment_cooldown_same_cave_sec: Minimum seconds between hazard events in the same cave zone.

coupler._comment_tau: Temperature relaxation time constant in seconds for rock tiles.
coupler._comment_T_base: Baseline equilibrium temperature (K) without any solar input.
coupler._comment_T_gain: Temperature increase (K) per unit of normalised insolation.
coupler._comment_T_ring: Temperature reduction (K) from full ring shadow.
coupler._comment_wind_heat: Strength of heat-gradient-driven wind (m/s per normalised grad unit).

evo._comment_enable: Master on/off switch for the evolution system.
evo._comment_tick: Evolution tick interval in game-seconds (30–120 recommended).
evo._comment_tiles: Number of tiles updated per evolution tick (budget control).
evo._comment_grid_w: Evolution grid width (longitude). Should match or be ≤ climate grid_w.
evo._comment_grid_h: Evolution grid height (latitude). Should match or be ≤ climate grid_h.
evo._comment_dust_lift_k: Dust lifting rate coefficient per evolution tick.
evo._comment_dust_dep_k: Dust deposition rate coefficient per evolution tick.
evo._comment_ice_form_k: Ice film formation rate coefficient per evolution tick.
evo._comment_ice_melt_k: Ice film melt rate coefficient per evolution tick.
evo._comment_fatigue_temp: Fracture fatigue growth rate from thermal cycling.
evo._comment_fatigue_stress: Fracture fatigue growth rate from geological stress.
evo._comment_slope_events: Cap on slope-collapse events generated per sim-hour.
evo._comment_quant: Bit depth for field quantisation in network messages (8 or 16).

skyphen._comment_halo_theta: Peak angle of the 22° ice-crystal halo (degrees).
skyphen._comment_halo_sigma: Gaussian half-width of the halo ring (degrees).
skyphen._comment_halo_k: Peak intensity multiplier for the halo effect.
skyphen._comment_corona_k: Peak intensity for diffraction corona (dust/crystal near sun).
skyphen._comment_parhelia_rarity: Fraction of time-buckets where parhelia appear [0-1].
skyphen._comment_parhelia_tb: Duration (seconds) of each parhelia on/off decision bucket.
skyphen._comment_ring_glint_k: Intensity of ring-edge arc / glint effect.
skyphen._comment_ring_glint_rarity: Fraction of buckets where ring glints appear [0-1].
skyphen._comment_tau: Exponential-smoothing time constant (seconds) for strength transitions.

macro._comment_tick: Server-tick interval for macro-phenomenon spawn evaluation (seconds).
macro._comment_max_active: Hard cap on total simultaneously active macro phenomena.

dustwall._comment_freq: Probability [0-1] of spawning a dust wall per tick when conditions are met.
dustwall._comment_int_min: Minimum intensity of spawned dust wall [0-1].
dustwall._comment_int_max: Maximum intensity of spawned dust wall [0-1].

lightning._comment_rarity: Probability [0-1] of spawning a lightning cluster per tick.
lightning._comment_flash_min: Minimum number of flashes in a cluster window.
lightning._comment_flash_max: Maximum number of flashes in a cluster window.

ringfront._comment_edge_width: Width (km) of the ring-shadow edge band visible in the atmosphere.

render._comment_steps_near: Ray-march steps for near phenomena (< 10 km). Higher = better quality.
render._comment_steps_far: Ray-march steps for distant phenomena. Reduced for performance.

audio._comment_rumble: Master gain [0-1] for dust-wall low-frequency rumble.

mega._comment: Stage 33 — rare mega-events (super-storm, global veil, rift, ring anomaly)

perception._comment: Stage 37 — Perception Field (nervous system for MotorStack).
perception._comment_tick_hz: Default sub-field update rate [Hz] when not overridden per-field.
perception._comment_vis_hz: VisibilityEstimator update rate [Hz]; visibility changes slowly.
perception._comment_smoothing_tau: Default exponential-smoothing time constant [s] for all sub-fields.

audio._comment_salience_radius: Radius [m] within which audio sources contribute to salience.

ground._comment_slip_mu_weight: Weight of friction-deficit on slip risk.
ground._comment_sink_weight: Weight of softness on sink risk.

wind._comment_load_k: Scale factor for wind load computation.

vibration._comment_weight: Scale factor for vibration level output.

presence._comment_radius: Radius [m] within which other players contribute to presence field.

assist._comment_opportunity_radius: Radius [m] within which an assist opportunity is considered.

intent._comment_tick_hz: IntentArbitrator update rate [Hz]; 5–15 Hz per spec §10.
intent._comment_blend_tau_sec: Exponential blend time constant for mode transitions [s].
intent._comment_w_balance: Weight for balanceRisk component of TotalCost.
intent._comment_mode_hysteresis_margin: Global offset applied to all mode enter/exit thresholds.
intent._comment_assist_threshold: Minimum assistOpportunity score to enter AssistPreparation mode.
intent._comment_max_speed_scale_under_risk: Minimum speed multiplier when movementConfidence is at zero.
intent._comment_max_stance_bias: Maximum stanceWidthBias value that can be applied under high-risk conditions [0..1].

social._comment_tick_hz: SocialCoupler update rate [Hz]; 2–10 Hz per spec §13.
social._comment_presence_radius: Radius [m] within which other players are socially perceived.
social._comment_alignment_strength_max: Cap on velocity-alignment strength in GroupCohesion [0..1].
social._comment_follow_low_vis: Enable Follow mode when visibility is low.
social._comment_assist_prep_threshold: Minimum assistOpportunity score to enter AssistPrep mode.
social._comment_yield_horizon: Look-ahead time [s] for collision trajectory prediction (§9).
social._comment_collision_min_dist: Minimum safe separation distance [m] for CollisionYield.
social._comment_mode_hysteresis_margin: Global offset applied to all social-mode enter/exit thresholds.

grasp._comment_enable: Master switch for the grasp system.
grasp._comment_reach_radius: Maximum reach distance [m] for establishing a grasp.
grasp._comment_score_threshold: Minimum GraspOpportunityDetector score to trigger ReachPlanner.
grasp._comment_max_force: Maximum constraint force [N, normalised] before clamping.
grasp._comment_break_force: Force magnitude [N] that breaks a grasp constraint.
grasp._comment_damping: Velocity damping coefficient at the constraint joint.
grasp._comment_pull_bias_max: Maximum pull-bias value the helper can apply [0..1].
grasp._comment_server_confirm_timeout_ms: Time [ms] client waits for server constraint confirmation.
grasp._comment_com_margin_min: Minimum COM-to-support-edge clearance before aborting reach.
grasp._comment_max_constraint_solve_iterations: Solver iterations budget per physics tick.
grasp._comment_ttc_max_sec: Maximum time-to-contact horizon [s] for opportunity scoring.

sim._comment_tick_hz: Primary simulation tick rate [Hz] (physics, motor, IK).

determinism._comment_strict: Raise DeterminismViolation instead of logging (dev/CI only).

budget._comment_fallback_enable: Enable automatic FallbackLadder degradation when over budget.

motor._comment_ik_iters: Max IK solver iterations per frame.

deform._comment_stamp: Max deformation stamp applications per second.
deform._comment_gpu_uploads: Max GPU deformation uploads per frame.

grasp._comment_grasps: Max simultaneous active grasps in the world.
grasp._comment_solve_iters: Max grasp constraint solve iterations per tick.

macro._comment_segments: Max mega-patch segments active at once.

net._comment_bps: Max network bytes per second per client.
net._comment_stamp_batches: Max stamp batches sent per second.

input._comment_pitch_deg: Maximum pitch angle [deg] for look direction (neck limit).
input._comment_mouse_sens: Degrees of look rotation per raw mouse unit.
input._comment_smooth_tau: Exponential smoothing time constant for move direction [s].

look._comment_head_yaw: Max head yaw relative to torso [deg].
look._comment_torso_yaw: Max torso yaw relative to body [deg].
look._comment_body_yaw_rate: Max body rotation speed when standing [deg/s].

suit._comment_com_shift: Max normalised COM shift from backpack [0..1].
suit._comment_palette: Default palette index (0 = dark base + orange accent).
